title: Astrophysics & Space Science Minor Dissertation (NASSP)
outline: This course consists of an investigation of an approved research topic on which a minor dissertation must be presented for formal assessment. The minor dissertation shall demonstrate the successful completion of a programme of training in research methods, a thorough understanding of the scientific principles underlying the research and an appropriate acquaintance with the relevant literature.
assessment: The minor dissertation must be presented for formal examination. Coursework and minor dissertation each count 50% towards the degree; each must be passed separately for the award of the degree.
